ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-06-2006 Reset To Apr-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. bura/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Petitioner: Milu Maggin, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.

The court continued matter to April 27, 2006, to further review and research the procedures of the Domestic Violence Confidentiality Program and Safe at Home Program.
